A single local change can cascade through the constraint graph to either unlock or collapse the entire structure's feasibility.

ranked_frameworks.name: Affective Convection Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Interpersonal conflicts operate as thermodynamic convection cells where emotional energy cycles through updraft (escalation) and downdraft (withdrawal) phases. Chronic conflicts function as supercell arguments that sustain themselves when communicative wind shear separates provocation from response.

ranked_frameworks.name: Capillary Cognition Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Sustained attention operates as a combustion system where motivational interest acts as capillary force, drawing cognitive fuel upward through processing layers until it ignites into conscious experience. Too much fuel smothers the flame, too little starves it, and environmental turbulence disrupts the laminar flow.

ranked_frameworks.name: Refractive Identity Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Personality assessment works like a prism: a single beam of behavior, when passed through the assessment instrument, separates into component wavelengths (traits). Different instruments (prisms) produce different spectral decompositions of the same behavior, and no single decomposition captures the original beam.

ranked_frameworks.name: Stigmergic Governance Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Effective large-scale governance emerges not from central planning but from environmental traces left by prior decisions that guide subsequent actors. Democratic deliberation works best when it modifies the environment (laws, infrastructure, norms) rather than attempting to direct behavior.

ranked_frameworks.name: Attention Bioluminescence Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Viral content creation follows energy-constrained signaling logic: creators convert metabolic resources into attention-photons through catalytic reactions, and the functional category of light produced — confusion, attraction, signaling, or camouflage — determines optimal deployment strategy.

ranked_frameworks.name: Cultural Song Drift Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Brand identity evolves through the same cultural transmission dynamics as whale song: all members express the same identity which changes gradually, novel approaches sweep through industries in waves, and distinctiveness correlates with competitive success. Brand voice is hierarchical (words to campaigns) just as whale song is hierarchical (notes to songs).

ranked_frameworks.name: Sociomagnetic Excitation Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Societies possess a layered 'sociomagnetic field' of institutional structures that channels disruptive external stimuli along pre-existing network lines to specific social strata, where each stratum emits a characteristic behavioral 'color' determined not by the stimulus itself but by the socioeconomic position of the excited group. The protective function and the spectacular disruption are the same mechanism: institutions cannot shield without also channeling.

ranked_frameworks.name: Laban Effort Theory of Cryptographic Key Ceremony
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: The security of cryptographic key generation ceremonies depends on the movement quality of the participants, analyzable through Laban effort dimensions. Weight (decisiveness of keystrokes), space (attention to environmental threats — direct vigilance vs. flexible scanning), time (urgency of the ceremony under exposure risk), and flow (bound procedural compliance vs. free improvisation when anomalies arise) define an expressive space of ceremony styles. Ceremonies that score high on bound flow and direct space produce keys with the highest operational security, while those drifting toward free flow and flexible space introduce entropy in the wrong places — not in the key material but in procedural adherence. Training key ceremony officers should therefore include Laban movement analysis to diagnose and correct risky behavioral signatures before they manifest as side-channel vulnerabilities.

ranked_frameworks.name: Stribeck Lubrication Theory of Diplomatic Relations
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: International diplomacy operates across three regimes identical to the Stribeck curve: at low relative velocity (peacetime stasis), boundary lubrication dominates — direct state-to-state contact generates high friction and territorial disputes. As interaction speed increases (trade acceleration, cultural exchange), a mixed regime emerges where institutional lubricants (treaties, international law) partially separate the surfaces. At high velocity (deep economic interdependence), full hydrodynamic lubrication develops — the 'fluid film' of shared institutions completely separates sovereign surfaces, and friction drops to near zero. War occurs when the lubricant film breaks down and the system snaps back to boundary contact.

ranked_frameworks.name: Volatile Acidity Oscillation Theory of Team Morale Dynamics
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Team morale oscillates through volatile acidity dynamics: acetic acid bacteria (cynics, complainers) convert the ethanol of team enthusiasm into vinegar of dissatisfaction in the presence of oxygen (external scrutiny, management pressure). The oscillation arises because high morale (high ethanol) invites exposure to oxygen (visibility, new demands), which feeds acetic bacteria, which reduces morale (converts ethanol to acid), which reduces oxygen exposure (team becomes invisible), allowing ethanol to rebuild. Maintaining morale requires either anaerobic conditions (shielding from external pressure) or sulfite addition (active suppression of cynicism vectors).

ranked_frameworks.name: Glacial Surge Theory of Creative Block Resolution
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Creative blocks resolve through glacial surge dynamics: subglacial meltwater (unconscious processing) slowly accumulates beneath the frozen creative surface, reducing basal friction until the entire ice mass lurches forward in a surge of productivity. The quiescent phase is not absence of work but pressurization; the surge phase is not inspiration but mechanical release. The oscillation period depends on the ratio of accumulation rate (input/experience) to the drainage efficiency of incremental output.

ranked_frameworks.name: Soil Microbiome Feedback Theory of Cryptocurrency Community Health
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Cryptocurrency communities develop plant-soil microbiome feedback loops: early community members (pioneer plants) condition the social substrate (norms, governance, culture) in ways that either facilitate or inhibit subsequent community growth. Positive feedback communities accumulate beneficial microbiota (constructive developers, honest validators) that enhance the token's health. Negative feedback communities accumulate pathogens (scammers, pump-and-dump operators) that make the soil toxic for legitimate participants. Once established, the feedback polarity is self-reinforcing and extremely difficult to reverse — explaining why early community culture is the strongest predictor of long-term token viability.

ranked_frameworks.name: Hydraulic Jump Theory of Phonological Neutralization
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Phoneme neutralization in unstressed syllables occurs through a process structurally identical to a hydraulic jump: high-energy articulatory distinctions in stressed positions flow into low-energy unstressed environments, where a critical threshold is crossed and the laminar distinctions between phonemes collapse into a turbulent, undifferentiated vowel space. The energy dissipated at this jump predicts which contrasts neutralize first and how much articulatory information is irrecoverably lost.

ranked_frameworks.name: Firn Densification Theory of Soil Horizon Development
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Soil horizon formation follows firn densification feedback dynamics: fresh organic inputs (analogous to snowfall) accumulate at the surface and undergo progressive compression, chemical transformation, and grain restructuring as they are buried by successive layers. The transition from O-horizon to A-horizon mirrors the firn-to-ice transition — a critical density threshold where interconnected pore spaces close off, fundamentally changing the material's hydrological and biological properties. The depth of this transition zone is governed by precipitation rate, temperature, and biological activity, just as firn densification depth depends on accumulation rate, temperature, and overburden pressure.

ranked_frameworks.name: Wound Healing Theory of Cryptographic Key Rotation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Cryptographic key rotation follows the phases of wound healing: the inflammatory phase (breach detection triggers immediate key revocation), the proliferative phase (new keys are generated and distributed across endpoints, forming a 'granulation tissue' of provisional trust), and the remodeling phase (redundant key material is pruned and access patterns mature into their final topology over weeks). Systems that skip the proliferative phase and jump directly to new keys suffer the cryptographic equivalent of wound dehiscence -- re-opening of the vulnerability because trust relationships were not properly re-established.

ranked_frameworks.name: Vowel Chain Shift Theory of Market Price Cascades
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Asset price adjustments in interconnected markets follow vowel chain shift dynamics: when one asset class (vowel) moves in price space, it creates a vacuum or compression that forces adjacent asset classes to shift in sequence, producing a cascade of price realignments that preserves the relative 'phonological distance' between assets. Push chains (one asset inflating forces others upward) and drag chains (one asset deflating pulls others down) produce systematically different cascade patterns, and the entire system resists mergers — two asset classes cannot occupy the same price niche indefinitely.

ranked_frameworks.name: Hardy-Cross Theory of Academic Department Resource Balancing
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: University resource allocation across departments self-corrects through Hardy-Cross iterative balancing: each budget cycle, departments with excess pressure (overenrollment, grant overhead) shed flow to neighboring departments through shared resources (cross-listed courses, joint hires, shared facilities), while departments with deficit pressure (underenrollment) receive compensating flow. The system converges through successive corrections, but convergence requires accurate resistance coefficients (administrative cost models) — if these are miscalibrated, the iteration diverges and produces resource oscillations between over- and under-funded departments.

ranked_frameworks.name: Zero-Knowledge Proof Theory of Terroir Verification
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Terroir claims in enology can be verified without revealing proprietary winemaking techniques through a protocol structurally identical to zero-knowledge proofs: the winemaker demonstrates that their wine possesses specific mineral isotope ratios, microbial signatures, and phenolic profiles consistent with the claimed origin, without disclosing the viticultural and cellar practices that produced them. The 'soundness' of the proof depends on the computational difficulty of forging these multi-dimensional chemical fingerprints from a different terroir.

ranked_frameworks.name: Tephra Dispersal Theory of Particle Swarm Exploration
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Particle swarm optimization's exploration phase follows tephra dispersal sorting dynamics: the initial 'eruption' of particles into the search space disperses them with a size-dependent sorting where high-inertia particles (large tephra) land close to the eruption point and explore locally, while low-inertia particles (fine ash) travel farthest and explore globally. The optimal inertia weight schedule in PSO corresponds to the atmospheric conditions that produce the most informative tephra deposit — one where the full range of particle sizes is well-separated across the landscape, maximizing information about the search space topology.

ranked_frameworks.name: Graph Coloring Theory of Interfaith Dialogue
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Productive interfaith dialogue requires a graph coloring solution: each theological tradition is a vertex, edges connect traditions with overlapping truth-claims, and the 'colors' are interpretive frameworks. Dialogue succeeds when adjacent traditions adopt different interpretive frameworks (comparative, experiential, historical, ethical) such that no two traditions sharing a contested claim use the same framework to discuss it. The chromatic number of the interfaith graph determines the minimum number of distinct interpretive frameworks needed, and the four-color theorem suggests that even the most densely interconnected theological landscape requires at most four distinct dialogical approaches.

ranked_frameworks.name: Stratigraphic Superposition Theory of Memory Consolidation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Long-term memory consolidation follows archaeological stratigraphy: newer memories deposit as upper layers that compress and distort older ones. Retrieval of deep memories requires 'excavation' through intervening strata, and the accuracy of recall degrades in proportion to the number and thickness of overlying deposits. Traumatic memories act as intrusive features that cut through normal stratification, remaining accessible regardless of depth but disrupting the chronological ordering of surrounding memories.

ranked_frameworks.name: Consciousness Microstructure Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Conscious experience has a microstructure analogous to financial market microstructure — the continuous feel of awareness emerges from discrete 'qualia transactions' with bid-ask spreads, order books, and latency, and phenomenal binding is a clearing mechanism that nets offsetting sensory signals.

ranked_frameworks.name: Vowel Chain Shift Theory of Cryptocurrency Token Migration
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: When one blockchain token shifts its functional niche (from currency to store-of-value), it displaces a neighboring token from that niche, which in turn displaces the next, producing a chain shift across the token ecosystem. The shift is driven by the same structural pressure as vowel chain shifts in phonology: tokens must maintain distinctiveness in the functional space, so one movement cascades through the entire system. The direction of the chain (push vs. pull) determines whether the ecosystem expands or contracts in functional diversity.

ranked_frameworks.name: Paris Law Theory of Tannin Polymerization Fatigue
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Tannin polymerization in aging wine follows Paris Law fatigue crack growth: each 'cycle' of oxidation-reduction (driven by micro-oxygenation through barrel staves) advances tannin chain length by an increment proportional to the stress intensity range — the amplitude of the redox oscillation. Below a threshold oxidation intensity, no polymerization occurs; above a critical intensity, catastrophic over-polymerization produces excessive sediment. The optimal aging regime maintains the stress intensity in the Paris Law's stable-growth regime, where chain elongation is predictable and controllable.

ranked_frameworks.name: SLAM Theory of Autobiographical Identity
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: The construction of autobiographical identity operates as Simultaneous Localization and Mapping: the self must simultaneously determine where it is in life-space (localization) and construct a coherent narrative map of its past (mapping), using noisy sensory evidence from memory. Identity crises occur when accumulated loop-closure failures (contradictions between the believed map and new evidence) exceed the filter's capacity to maintain a consistent joint estimate.

ranked_frameworks.name: Dansgaard-Oeschger Oscillation Theory of Artistic Canon Formation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: The artistic canon oscillates between periods of inclusive expansion and exclusive contraction on a timescale governed by paleoclimatic-style bipolar seesaw dynamics: when one hemisphere of the art world (e.g., Western institutions) warms to diversity and expands the canon, it draws critical attention and resources away from the other hemisphere (non-Western traditions), which cools and contracts. The oscillation is quasi-periodic (~25-50 year cycles) and is driven by the 'freshwater forcing' of generational taste shifts that disrupt the established thermohaline circulation of prestige.

ranked_frameworks.name: Stribeck Curve Theory of Workplace Conflict Lubrication
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Interpersonal conflict in organizations passes through Stribeck lubrication regimes. At low interaction velocity (rare contact), boundary friction dominates — every encounter generates maximal personal friction. At intermediate velocity, a mixed regime emerges where institutional protocols partially lubricate interactions. At high velocity (constant collaboration), full hydrodynamic lubrication develops — the thick film of shared context and routine eliminates personal friction entirely. The optimal operating point minimizes total organizational wear.

ranked_frameworks.name: Plinian Column Collapse Theory of Oral Epic Fragmentation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Long oral epic traditions collapse through a mechanism identical to Plinian volcanic column dynamics: a sustained vertical 'column' of performative energy — driven by audience engagement, performer skill, and cultural investment — maintains the epic's coherent structure against gravitational pull toward fragmentation. When the mass flux of new performers entering the tradition drops below a critical threshold, or when the cultural 'vent pressure' weakens, the column collapses, and the formerly unified epic breaks into pyroclastic flows of disconnected episodes, legends, and folk motifs that spread laterally across the cultural landscape.

ranked_frameworks.name: Thermohaline Circulation Theory of Knowledge Flow in Organizations
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Knowledge circulates through large organizations via thermohaline-like overturning: 'hot' knowledge (novel insights, market intelligence) rises through informal networks to executive levels where it cools into codified strategy, then sinks as 'cold' directives through formal hierarchies back to operational levels. The circulation rate depends on knowledge density gradients (expertise concentration) and salinity analogs (organizational culture viscosity). Disruption of this circulation produces knowledge 'stagnation zones' equivalent to oceanic dead zones.

ranked_frameworks.name: Triboelectric Theory of Organizational Blame Transfer
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: When organizational units come into repeated contact under pressure, blame accumulates on the unit with lower 'work-function' prestige, exactly as triboelectric charge separates at material interfaces. The resulting blame gradient drives defensive behaviors that further increase friction, until discharge events (firings, restructurings) reset the potential — only for the cycle to resume with the next contact pair.

ranked_frameworks.name: Chiasmus Theory of Wound Healing Phase Reversal
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: The four phases of wound healing (hemostasis, inflammation, proliferation, remodeling) follow a chiasmic rhetorical structure where the molecular signals of the second half mirror and invert those of the first: the pro-inflammatory cytokines of phase 2 are structurally answered by anti-inflammatory resolvins in phase 3, and the rapid clot formation of phase 1 is inverted by the slow matrix remodeling of phase 4. Failed healing occurs when this chiasmic symmetry breaks — when the rhetorical 'turn' from destruction to reconstruction is not properly executed.

ranked_frameworks.name: Precipitation Hardening Theory of Mycorrhizal Network Resilience
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Mycorrhizal networks develop resilience through a process analogous to precipitation hardening in alloys: dissolved nutrients cycling through the hyphal matrix gradually precipitate as insoluble mineral-organic complexes at fungal cell junctions, creating microscopic 'hardening particles' that impede the propagation of pathogenic infections and physical disruptions through the network. Young networks (solution-treated) are ductile but vulnerable; aged networks (peak-hardened) resist damage but become brittle; over-aged networks lose both flexibility and resistance as the precipitates coarsen and lose coherency with the fungal matrix.

ranked_frameworks.name: Felting Entanglement Theory of Social Trust
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Social trust in communities builds through a mechanism analogous to felting: random interpersonal encounters (fiber contacts) under social 'agitation' (shared crises, festivals, market interactions) form irreversible bonds when the interactions exceed a threshold of emotional intensity. Communities with insufficient agitation remain loose assemblages; those with excessive agitation compact into rigid, exclusionary structures. Trust density follows the same irreversible entanglement kinetics as wool fiber under heat and moisture.

ranked_frameworks.name: Wavefront Resonance Theory of Religious Revivals
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Religious revival movements propagate as spatial wavefronts analogous to epidemic wavefronts: they amplify when encountering susceptible population clusters (communities experiencing anomie, economic dislocation, or cultural upheaval) and attenuate when hitting 'immune barriers' (secularized or religiously saturated populations). The Great Awakenings in American history exhibit wavefront velocities and amplification patterns consistent with spatial SIR dynamics coupled to socioeconomic susceptibility gradients.

ranked_frameworks.name: Triboelectric Charge Theory of Denominational Ladder Selection
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Denominational systems in coinage self-organize through triboelectric charge separation dynamics: frequent transactional 'contact' between denomination levels generates a charge differential — an information gradient about relative purchasing power — that separates denominations into distinct functional roles (small change vs. store of value vs. unit of account). Denominations that fail to accumulate sufficient charge separation from their neighbors are eliminated from circulation, predicting that stable monetary systems require minimum ratio gaps between adjacent denominations analogous to the triboelectric series spacing.

ranked_frameworks.name: Selvage Edge Theory of National Borders
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: National borders function as selvage edges in the geopolitical fabric: specialized binding structures (customs, border patrols, checkpoints) that prevent the unraveling of state sovereignty. Borders that lack adequate 'edge construction' (weak states, disputed territories) fray under tension, allowing cross-border flows of people, goods, and violence that progressively unweave the state's territorial integrity. The stability of a border depends not on its length but on the quality of its edge-locking mechanism.

ranked_frameworks.name: Shell Company Network Theory of Third-Body Wear Layers
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Third-body wear layers in tribological contacts form hierarchical structures topologically identical to shell company networks in financial fraud: primary wear particles (first-shell entities) aggregate into secondary structures (holding companies) that create a layered topology designed to obscure the direct contact between the two sliding surfaces (the ultimate beneficial owners). Detection of the true contact state requires the same graph-theoretic techniques used in forensic accounting — tracing connectivity through the obfuscating intermediate layer to reveal the load-bearing paths hidden within the debris.

ranked_frameworks.name: Dialectical Trinity: Substance Through Sublation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: The three divine persons of Trinitarian theology can be structurally re-derived as a necessary dialectical unfolding where the Father posits the Son as antithesis, and the Spirit emerges as the synthesis that preserves both distinction and unity, such that Trinitarian coherence is the only stable resolution of a self-relating absolute.

ranked_frameworks.name: Complexity-Bounded Cryptographic Hardness
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: RSA security is proportional to the Kolmogorov complexity of the private key: algorithmically random primes resist factoring because no program shorter than the primes themselves can derive them, while low-complexity primes admit shorter attack programs exploiting structural regularity.

ranked_frameworks.name: Entropic Uncertainty Budgeting
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Measurement uncertainty components can be optimally combined by treating each as a symbol in an information-theoretic alphabet, weighting by informational surprise — the resulting combined uncertainty minimizes redundancy and approaches a theoretical lower bound analogous to the Shannon entropy bound in source coding.

ranked_frameworks.name: Heroic Clonal Selection
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Immune clonal selection follows monomyth narrative logic: naive cell (ordinary world) → antigen encounter (call) → germinal center (ordeal) → affinity maturation (transformation) → memory cell (return with boon). Clones that skip stages produce lower-quality immunity.

ranked_frameworks.name: Inhibitory Field Settlement Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: New settlements nucleate at points of lowest cumulative inhibition from existing centers, producing golden-angle spiral patterns rather than hexagonal grids — yielding more efficient coverage than Christaller's static tiling when growth is sequential.

ranked_frameworks.name: Chromatophoric Brand Display Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Corporate rebranding operates as a chromatophore system: rapid, neurally-centralized modulation of surface-level identity elements that simultaneously serves multiple contradictory functions through patterns the organism itself cannot perceive from the outside. Like cuttlefish displaying patterns invisible to their own eyes, companies project brand identities they cannot objectively evaluate, making rebranding an act of blind signaling whose success depends on audience neurology, not sender intention.

ranked_frameworks.name: Sonata Form Theory of Wound Healing Phases
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Wound healing follows sonata form development: the exposition presents two contrasting 'themes' — pro-inflammatory destruction and pro-regenerative growth — in separate phases. The development section (proliferative phase) fragments, modulates, and recombines these themes through complex cytokine interactions. The recapitulation (remodeling phase) restates both themes in the 'home key' of tissue homeostasis. Chronic wounds are analogous to a sonata stuck in its development section, endlessly modulating without achieving recapitulation, while keloid scarring represents a recapitulation that overshoots into a coda of excessive tissue production.

ranked_frameworks.name: Circadian Oscillator Theory of Financial Markets
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Market sentiment follows a transcription-translation feedback loop structurally identical to circadian clock genes: optimism (the 'protein product') accumulates during trading hours, eventually triggering its own negative regulator (risk aversion), which suppresses further optimism until it degrades overnight. The resulting ~24-hour sentiment oscillation explains persistent intraday patterns in volatility and volume better than rational expectations models.

ranked_frameworks.name: Entanglement Distribution Theory of Diplomatic Alliances
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: International alliances function as entanglement distribution networks where trust (the diplomatic analog of quantum entanglement) degrades with geopolitical distance and is subject to a no-cloning constraint: a nation cannot simultaneously maintain equally strong bilateral trust with two mutually hostile powers. Alliance maintenance requires continuous 'entanglement distillation' through summits, joint exercises, and treaty renewals, and the effective alliance radius is bounded by the rate at which trust decoheres through competing interests.

ranked_frameworks.name: Mercerization Theory of Cultural Transformation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Rapid cultural transformation follows mercerization dynamics: immersion in a strong ideological 'solution' (revolution, religious conversion, colonization) causes differential swelling and crystalline rearrangement of social structures. Communities that fully convert from their original 'cellulose I' cultural arrangement to 'cellulose II' gain new properties (cohesion, identity clarity, external signaling power) but lose their original texture irreversibly. Partially converted communities exhibit the weakest structural properties of either arrangement.

ranked_frameworks.name: Innate Diffraction Grammar
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: The universal structural patterns in human language arise from interference effects — phonological and syntactic primitives combine like wave fronts passing through a lattice, producing constructive interference at grammatical positions and destructive interference at ungrammatical ones, with Bragg-like selection rules determining which combinations amplify.

ranked_frameworks.name: Cultural Plume Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Deep structural conditions form fixed innovation plumes that persist in geographic locations. As the broader socioeconomic plate drifts over these plumes, each location experiences a temporary eruption of creative output, then goes dormant, leaving chronologically ordered chains of formerly innovative cities.

ranked_frameworks.name: Morphogen Gradient Theory of Wealth Distribution
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Income distribution in market economies follows morphogen gradient dynamics: economic policy centers (central banks, fiscal authorities) act as morphogen sources, and the concentration of economic stimulus diffuses outward through institutional layers. Cells (firms and households) at different distances from the source interpret threshold concentrations as fate instructions, differentiating into distinct economic roles. Wealth inequality is thus a positional-information problem, not merely a market-competition outcome.

ranked_frameworks.name: Fourier Decomposition Theory of Personality
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Personality is not a fixed set of trait dimensions but a superposition of behavioral harmonics: each situation activates a different frequency component of the person's behavioral repertoire, and the observed personality at any moment is the Fourier sum of all active components. The Big Five factors correspond to the lowest-frequency (most persistent) harmonics, while situational variability reflects higher-frequency components that average out over time. Personality disorders represent missing or overamplified harmonics.

ranked_frameworks.name: Zero-Knowledge Proof Theory of Therapeutic Disclosure
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Effective psychotherapy operates through a zero-knowledge proof protocol: the client must convince the therapist of their internal state (the 'witness') without revealing the traumatic content directly, using indirect challenges (metaphors, somatic responses, behavioral patterns) that allow the therapist to verify the emotional truth without possessing the specific memories. This explains why narrative exposure therapy sometimes re-traumatizes: it violates the zero-knowledge property by forcing full witness disclosure.

ranked_frameworks.name: Phyllotaxis Theory of Urban Zoning
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Optimal urban land-use zoning follows phyllotactic packing principles: each new development creates an inhibitory field (noise, traffic, shade) that repels similar developments, and the next project of the same type is placed at the point of least inhibition. When market forces are allowed to operate freely under basic constraints, the resulting spatial distribution of commercial, residential, and industrial zones converges on golden-angle spacing that maximizes resource access and minimizes inter-zone conflict.

ranked_frameworks.name: Bragg Diffraction Theory of Electoral Periodicity
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Voter behavior in periodic elections exhibits constructive and destructive interference patterns analogous to Bragg diffraction. When the 'wavelength' of policy-cycle expectations aligns with the 'lattice spacing' of election intervals, voter mobilization constructively interferes to produce landslide outcomes. Misalignment between policy-expectation cycles and electoral timing produces diffuse, low-turnout elections where no clear mandate crystallizes.

ranked_frameworks.name: Coriolis Deflection Theory of Career Trajectories
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Career trajectories in large organizations are deflected by a Coriolis-like force: individuals moving 'poleward' (toward senior leadership) experience a systematic rightward deflection into staff roles, advisory positions, and lateral moves, because the organization's rotational velocity (pace of change) increases with hierarchical altitude. Those who attempt rapid ascent without accounting for this deflection end up in positions they did not intend, while those who understand the deflection can use it to navigate to desired positions by aiming off-target.

ranked_frameworks.name: Memetic Clonal Selection: Ideational Affinity Maturation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Immune repertoire diversification follows memetic dynamics where lymphocyte clones function as idea-units competing for antigenic attention, with somatic hypermutation acting as transmission-error variation and clonal expansion as viral resharing within the body's internal communication network.

ranked_frameworks.name: Karmic Bubble Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Speculative bubbles accumulate 'market karma' through aggregate trade intentionality — momentum trades generate unwholesome karma that deterministically degrades future price quality, and bubble collapse is the financial equivalent of karmic rebirth into a lower realm.

ranked_frameworks.name: The Incompleteness of the Sacred
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Any theological system rich enough to articulate claims about the divine necessarily contains true statements about the divine that cannot be derived from its own axioms, structurally guaranteeing that apophatic residue is not a mystical preference but a formal inevitability.

ranked_frameworks.name: Autopoietic Attention
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Transformer attention heads redesigned as self-producing systems where Q/K/V projections are regenerated by their own outputs achieve organizational closure — self-maintaining and adaptive without external parameter updates at inference time.

ranked_frameworks.name: Agentic Gradient Compliance
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: SGD works via an obedience mechanism: parameters cede local optimization to a centralized gradient authority. Compliance increases with graduated commitment (warm-up) and authority legitimacy (batch size), mirroring Milgram's obedience dynamics.

ranked_frameworks.name: Defensive Zero-Knowledge
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Zero-knowledge proofs select from a menu of proof strategies analogous to ego defense mechanisms — commitment schemes as repression, simulator proofs as projection, homomorphic commitments as sublimation — each trading computational cost against information leakage.

ranked_frameworks.name: Self-Determined Fermentation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Microbial colonies meeting analogues of autonomy (substrate choice), competence (enzymatic feedback), and relatedness (quorum sensing) shift from opportunistic to robust intrinsic fermentation — controlling conditions suppress this transition like controlling social contexts undermine intrinsic motivation.

ranked_frameworks.name: Sequential Crisis Nucleation Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Dissipative structures undergo an ordered sequence of critical transitions where each resolution constrains subsequent bifurcation outcomes — systems that skip or fail early stages cannot access high-order structures later, mirroring how Erikson's unresolved stages limit later psychosocial development.

ranked_frameworks.name: Effort-Qualified Turbulence (EQT)
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Turbulent flow structures classified by four Laban-like effort factors: Weight (momentum flux), Time (acceleration profile), Space (vorticity alignment), Flow (strain constraint). The combinatorial state determines each parcel's role in the turbulent cascade.

ranked_frameworks.name: Staged Consensus Maturation
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Blockchain nodes undergo invariant developmental stages (reactive sync → symbolic validation → rule-based verification → formal reasoning) driven by disequilibrium, and no stage can be skipped without compromising fault tolerance — mirroring Piaget's cognitive development.

ranked_frameworks.name: Choreographic Consensus Protocol
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Distributed systems can achieve consensus through intensity-weighted signaling where nodes broadcast proposals with vigor proportional to measured quality, and quorum emerges from recruitment cascades rather than explicit voting rounds.

ranked_frameworks.name: Shadow Bias Projection Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Algorithmic biases cast directional shadows whose length and direction depend on the angle of inquiry, like a sundial gnomon. Bias detection requires measuring shadow patterns across multiple inquiry angles rather than seeking a single bias metric.

ranked_frameworks.name: Affective Magnetosphere Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Collective emotions behave as charged particles within a social magnetosphere: external events act as solar wind injecting emotional energy into a society's relational field structure, where that energy is channeled along pre-existing network lines and excites distinct social strata to produce characteristic emotional colors.

ranked_frameworks.name: Galois Theory of Political Coalition Structure
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: The solvability of political coalitions corresponds to the structure of their Galois groups: simple coalitions (cyclic group structure) can be decomposed into stable bilateral agreements, while complex coalitions with non-abelian group structure resist decomposition and collapse unpredictably. The fundamental theorem of Galois theory maps onto coalition politics: each subgroup corresponds to a sub-coalition, and the lattice of subgroups predicts which defections are possible and which combinations are stable.

ranked_frameworks.name: Laban Effort-Shape Theory of Glacial Flow Morphology
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Glacial flow patterns can be classified using Laban's effort-shape framework: glaciers exhibit characteristic combinations of weight (ice thickness pressure), time (flow velocity), space (valley confinement), and flow (laminar vs. surging). Temperate glaciers display 'sustained, direct, heavy' effort qualities producing predictable U-shaped valleys, while surge-type glaciers alternate between 'bound' quiescent phases and 'free' surge phases — a movement quality shift that maps onto Laban's effort transitions and predicts the geomorphological record each glacier type leaves behind.

ranked_frameworks.name: Milankovitch Forcing Theory of Sur Lie Autolysis Rhythms
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Yeast autolysis during sur lie aging follows Milankovitch orbital forcing patterns at the cellar timescale: seasonal temperature oscillations (annual cycle), barometric pressure variations (synoptic cycle), and long-period cellar humidity fluctuations (multi-year cycle) each drive autolysis at different frequencies. The total autolysis rate is the superposition of these three forcing cycles, and the most complex, desirable flavor profiles emerge when the cycles constructively interfere — producing windows of intense autolytic activity separated by quiescent intervals that allow intermediate compounds to equilibrate before the next burst.

ranked_frameworks.name: Rossby Wave Theory of Tonal Register Drift
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Tonal register drift in tone languages propagates through speaker communities as Rossby waves propagate through the atmosphere: perturbations in the 'mean flow' of tonal register (the average pitch range of a speech community) generate oscillatory waves that propagate westward (or outward from urban centers) due to the Coriolis-like effect of social prestige gradients. These waves modulate local tonal inventories as they pass, producing the observed geographic patterns of tonal merger and split that correlate with dialect isoglosses. The wave speed and wavelength predict the timescale of tonal change.

ranked_frameworks.name: Tectonic Predator-Prey Dynamics
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Oceanic and continental plates form coupled oscillatory systems analogous to predator-prey dynamics, where subducting oceanic plates (prey) are consumed at convergent boundaries by overriding continental plates (predators), producing cyclical pulses in plate area, velocity, and supercontinent assembly that follow Lotka-Volterra-type equations.

ranked_frameworks.name: Galois-Curry: Automorphism Groups of Proof Spaces
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: The solvability of a type inhabitation problem is determined by the symmetry group of proof-preserving transformations on its derivation tree. A type is 'radically inhabitable' if and only if its proof automorphism group is solvable — mirroring how the Galois group determines solvability by radicals.

ranked_frameworks.name: Cognitive Condensation Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Cooper pair formation is a phase transition analogous to flow state entry: scattered electrons condense into coherent paired states exhibiting zero-resistance transport when challenge-skill balance (phonon coupling at critical temperature) is reached.

ranked_frameworks.name: Entangled Intentionality Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Entangled particles function as if each maintains a 'mental model' of its partner's measurement context — Bell violations correspond to second-order intentionality exceeding the first-order (local hidden variable) ceiling, bounded by a no-communication constraint analogous to cognitive load limits on recursive mentalizing.

ranked_frameworks.name: Chromatic Mythography
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Narrative archetypes function as graph colorings over a conflict-adjacency structure: each archetype is a color assigned so no two conflicting characters share the same role. The chromatic number determines the minimum archetypes needed for structural coherence.

ranked_frameworks.name: Crease-Code Folding Theory
ranked_frameworks.core_claim: Linear sequences fold into functional 3D structures by satisfying local angular constraints analogous to origami theorems. Misfolding pathologies arise when local constraint satisfaction is achieved but global flat-foldability is violated, producing metastable trapped states.
